title: Lastrea ornata

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various ailments such as arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Lastrea ornata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Lastrea ornata is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are commonly used to treat skin conditions and infections.
